rmu.settings.magicalLightDegrades.name: Magical Light Degrades
rmu.settings.magicalLightDegrades.hint: If disabled, magical light creates a sharp edge, providing its base illumination up to its radius and dropping instantly to pitch black beyond. If enabled, the light drops two tiers at the radius boundary and degrades normally thereafter, creating a softer fade.
rmu.settings.configMenu.name: Lighting & Vision Configuration
rmu.settings.configMenu.label: Open Configuration Panel
rmu.settings.configMenu.hint: Customize how RMU light tiers are rendered on the canvas and manage scene migrations.
rmu.settings.configMenu.title: RMU Lighting Configuration
rmu.settings.canvas.hint: Define how each RMU mechanical tier is drawn on the physical canvas. This is the raw environmental lighting before any token vision modes are applied.
rmu.settings.vision.hint: Define how different token vision modes perceive the raw canvas lighting.
rmu.migration.title: RMU World Migration
rmu.migration.description: Choose how you want to manage the tokens and lights in your world.
rmu.migration.appliedSuccess: RMU Lighting Engine successfully applied to world.
rmu.migration.restoredSuccess: Foundry VTT defaults successfully restored to world.
rmu.migration.welcome.p1: It looks like this is your first time using the RMU Lighting module in this world.
rmu.migration.welcome.p2: To use the strict RMU lighting rules, we need to migrate your existing tokens and light sources. (Don't worry, your original settings are safely backed up so you can revert at any time).
rmu.migration.welcome.p3: Would you like to apply the RMU mechanics to your world now?
rmu.keybinds.checkLighting.name: Check Target Lighting
rmu.keybinds.checkLighting.hint: Outputs the exact RMU lighting degradation penalty between the selected token and their target.
rmu.warnings.selectOneTarget: You must control exactly one token and target exactly one token to calculate lighting penalties.
rmu.chat.noLineOfSight: No Line of Sight to Target
rmu.light.baseIlluminationHint: The starting light tier within the first 10 feet. The module will automatically degrade the light at 30, 100, and 300 feet.
rmu.light.isMagicalHint: Flags this light as magical, allowing it to overcome standard magical darkness.
rmu.light.isUtter.name: Is Utterlight/Utterdark?
rmu.light.isUtter.hint: Check this box to elevate the source to Utterlight or Utterdark (if set as a source of darkness), making it absolute.
